ItacPersonItem.Notes: Ferrier, among the founders of the Rozzi, he proposed the following emblem and motto for the Congrega dei Rozzi: faces directed towards the shining sun, and the motto: `Quanti ne inlustri, più ne fai rozi`. See his biography by Ilio Calabresi in DBI. Cenni was also the editor of `Stanze di M. Margarita d`Alissandro del Perna` (Siena 1547), and the author of `Piu` operette volgari` (Siena, Simone di Niccolo` di Nardi, 1532).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
